title: DataTable Renderer
description: Interactive data table for cell output. Renders DataFrames with sorting, filtering, pagination, and lazy column profiling.

enabled.title: Enable auto-rendering
enabled.description: When true, intercepts DataFrame outputs and renders them with the interactive DataTable widget.

htmlInterception.title: Intercept HTML tables
htmlInterception.description: Enable the client-side HTML table interceptor for kernels without the formatter hook.

lazyProfiles.title: Lazy-load column profiles
lazyProfiles.description: Fetch column statistics on hover rather than up front.

maxClientRows.title: Max rows for client-side fallback
maxClientRows.description: When the server extension is unavailable, the maximum number of rows to keep in the browser.
